root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as memname, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc, sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type.item_type_description, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_value, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.operate_date, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.doc_no, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_stock, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.entry_date, '0' as c_status, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.entry_id, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.seq_no FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail, sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type.item_type = sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ASC, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.seq_no ASC
